position: The Digital Economist is a thought-leadership and impact organization dedicated to shaping a more human-centered global economy. Through research, convening, and public advocacy, it brings together policymakers, technologists, academics, and business leaders to explore how digital innovations can advance sustainable, inclusive growth.At the heart of this work is the Executive Fellowship, an exclusive program for visionary leaders committed to accelerating transformative change on a global scale. Fellows are integrated into The Digital Economist’s Center of Excellence, contributing to high-level initiatives, publications, and public discourse. With a minimum commitment of just 24 hours per year, Fellows engage in monthly meetings, receive speaking opportunities, and convene in regional and global forums including representation at Davos and other flagship global events.
